observed_anomaly_cues: Visual pattern suggesting small hole or puncture
Localized deviation from normal leather appearance
mechanism_explanation: A sharp object or excessive point force penetrates the material surface.
severity_visual_description: moderate small hole or puncture visible under inspection lighting
corrective_action: Install protective barriers and review handling procedures.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the small hole or puncture would be absent and surface appears normal.
